name: Network Scan Detector
description: Detects horizontal port scanning (Nmap sweeps) across the LAN.

documentation.summary: The Network Scan Detector identifies compromised internal machines performing horizontal port scans. By silently tracking SYN packets on the network interface, it catches internal Nmap sweeps before they map out the local network.

sections.title: Features
content: Threshold-Based Detection: Configurable scan detection parameters.
Multiple Scan Types: Detects SYN scans, UDP sweeps, and banner grabbing.
Intelligent Filtering: Excludes legitimate internal services from scan detection.
Source Tracking: Logs internal attacker IP addresses and scan patterns.

sections.title: Security Architecture
content: Raw Socket Monitoring: Uses packet-level inspection for accuracy.
Host Network Access: Direct visibility into all network traffic.

heuristics.recommendation_reason: Core Network Sensor. Highly recommended to silently detect lateral Nmap sweeps and horizontal port scanning across the network interface.

env_vars.name: HW_HUB_ENDPOINT
env_vars.description: The URL of your central HoneyWire Hub.

env_vars.name: HW_SENSOR_ID
env_vars.description: Unique identifier for this specific trap.

env_vars.name: HW_SCAN_THRESHOLD
env_vars.description: Number of ports that must be scanned to trigger detection.

env_vars.name: HW_SCAN_WINDOW
env_vars.description: Time window in seconds for scan detection.

env_vars.name: HW_IGNORE_PORTS
env_vars.description: Comma-separated list of ports to exclude from scan detection.
